---
title: "FastPGT Calculator"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(shiny)
source("R/simulator.R")

```

## Inputs {.sidebar}

```{r}
shiny::sliderInput("n", "Muestras por corrida", min = 2, max = 24, value = 8)
shiny::sliderInput("r", "Número de corridas", min = 1, max = 12, value = 6)
```


## Resultados


```{r}

renderPrint({

  sim <- run_simulation(
    input$n,
    input$r
  )

  sim$resumen

})

```


## Decisión

```{r}

renderPrint({

  decision_run(
    input$n,
    input$r
  )

})

```

## Grafico

```{r}

renderPlot({

  sim <- run_simulation(
    input$n,
    input$r
  )

  sim$detalle %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = corrida, y = costo_promedio_global)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point() +
    theme_minimal()

})

```
